# rapid7_siem_variable (Resource)

Manages a [variable](https://docs.rapid7.com/insightidr/use-variables-in-queries) that can be referenced in log search queries and custom detection rules



## Example

```terraform
resource "rapid7_siem_variable" "example_variable" {
  name  = "variable"
  value = "some, values"
}
```



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Unique name for the variable. Alphanumeric and underscore characters are permitted.
- `value` (String) LEQL-syntax values

### Optional

- `description` (String) Describe what the value of the variable represents

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the variable
